children.heading: Policy reaffirmation
children.label: a Policy reaffirmation
children.text: Congress reaffirms the policy set forth in relating to surveying near-Earth asteroids and comets.section 20102(g) of title 51

children.heading: Implementation
children.label: b Implementation
children.text: The Director of the OSTP shall implement, before , a policy for notifying Federal agencies and relevant emergency response institutions of an impending near-Earth object threat if near-term public safety is at risk, and assign a Federal agency or agencies to be responsible for protecting the United States and working with the international community on such threats.September 30, 2012
